---
# 一：题目类型
低指数加密
# 二：题目
```python
from secret import flag
from Crypto.Util.number import*

m = long_to_bytes(flag)
p = getPrime(1024)
q = getPrime(1024)
n = p*q
e = 3
c = pow(m,e,n)
'''
c = 150409620528288093947185249913242033500530715593845912018225648212915478065982806112747164334970339684262757
e = 3
n = 

'''

```
# 三：解题思路
这是一类典型的低指数加密攻击的题目，在类题目中，e过小。我们可以通过暴力求解直接得出密钥。
# 四：解题代码
```python
from Crypto.Util.number import*
from gmpy2 import*


e=3
c=150409620528288093947185249913242033500530715593845912018225648212915478065982806112747164334970339684262757
for i in range(10000):  
    m, t = gmpy2.iroot(i*n + c, e)
    if t:
        print(bytearray.fromhex(format(m, 'x')).decode())
        break
```
# 五：感悟
